records.question: I'm looking for Douglas McCrory who is at least 36 years old, lives in Hartford, is a Dem party member, and drives a full-time school bus with exactly 8 years of experience. Can you find him?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 8 AND driver.age >= 36 AND driver.name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Driver_ID FROM driver AS T1 INNER JOIN school_bus AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID = T2.Driver_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND T1.Age >= 36 AND T1.Home_city = 'Hartford' AND T1.Party = 'Dem' AND T2.If_full_time = 1 AND T2.Years_Working = 8

records.question: Which drivers who are at least 36 years old, live in Hartford, are affiliated with the Dem party, and drive full-time school buses with no more than 8 years experience work for Occidental College, where the school type is Private and the location includes California?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school.location LIKE '%California%' AND driver.age >= 36 AND school.type = 'Private' AND school.school = 'Occidental College' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem' AND school_bus.years_working <= 8
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Driver_ID FROM driver AS T1 INNER JOIN school_bus AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID = T2.Driver_ID INNER JOIN school AS T3 ON T2.School_ID = T3.School_ID WHERE T1.Age >= 36 AND T1.Home_city = 'Hartford' AND T1.Party = 'Dem' AND T2.If_full_time = 1 AND T2.Years_Working <= 8 AND T3.School = 'Occidental College' AND T3.Type = 'Private' AND T3.Location LIKE '%California%'

records.question: Which drivers who are Democrats have exactly 10 years working with school buses that serve Kindergarten schools?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 10 AND school.grade = 'Kindergarten' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Driver_ID FROM driver AS T1 INNER JOIN school_bus AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID = T2.Driver_ID INNER JOIN school AS T3 ON T2.School_ID = T3.School_ID WHERE T1.Party = 'Democrat' AND T2.Years_Working = 10 AND T3.Grade = 'Kindergarten'

records.question: Which drivers named Matthew Ritter are from Hartford and are members of the Dem party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
WHERE driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.name = 'Matthew Ritter' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Driver_ID FROM driver WHERE Name = 'Matthew Ritter' AND Home_city = 'Hartford' AND Party = 'Dem'

records.question: Which drivers operate school buses that are full-time?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Driver_ID FROM driver AS T1 INNER JOIN school_bus AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID = T2.Driver_ID WHERE T2.If_full_time = 1
